# Persian Transliterator

> Chrome extension that converts Latin keyboard input to Persian (Farsi) characters in real time.

Persian Transliterator helps users type Persian text on Latin keyboards without switching layouts. It operates entirely offline and integrates seamlessly with standard web inputs.

## Key Features
- Real-time Latin → Persian transliteration in text fields
- Global and per-site enable/disable toggles
- Right-click context menu for on-demand transliteration
- Custom mapping editor with validation
- Modifier-key bypass (Ctrl/Alt/Cmd)
- No data ever leaves the browser

## Source
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cocodedk/fa-transliterate)
- [Releases](https://github.com/cocodedk/fa-transliterate/releases)
